datapoints.description: Total number of placement groups in the cluster
datapoints.name: total

datapoints.description: Placement groups in clean state (all replicas present)
datapoints.name: clean

datapoints.description: Degraded placement groups (fewer copies than expected)
datapoints.name: degraded

datapoints.description: Undersized placement groups (fewer replicas than configured)
datapoints.name: undersized

datapoints.description: Stale placement groups (not updated by OSD)
datapoints.name: stale

datapoints.description: Recovery throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: recovering_bytes_per_sec

description: Cluster-wide Ceph placement group health counts and recovery status via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Collects cluster-level Ceph PG state counts from Thanos. Degraded, undersized, stale, and unclean PGs indicate data availability issues. Non-zero recovering_bytes_per_sec means the cluster is rebalancing data.
name: ODF_Ceph_PG_Status
